Ou passez par leur site internet ici : https://bit.ly/AUTODOC_WEB_KevinBukkart


🚀 Et si l’avenir de Spider-Man dans le MCU était déjà totalement planifié… bien au-delà de Brand New Day ? Entre record historique du trailer, nouvelle trilogie, évolution radicale de Peter Parker, introduction possible de Miles Morales et lien direct avec Secret Wars, tout indique que Marvel et Sony préparent quelque chose de massif. Dans cette vidéo, on décrypte ce que Spider-Man: Brand New Day change vraiment, mais surtout ce que ça annonce pour les prochaines années du personnage… jusqu’à la fin de Tom Holland et l’arrivée d’une nouvelle ère.

snippet.title: TV Royale | Evo Minion Horde, Hero Balloon, Festival Market and MORE!
snippet.description:
X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
snippet.description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

VENOM est caché dans le trailer officiel de SPIDER-MAN 4 BRAND NEW DAY et est au centre de tout le film ! LA vidéo théorie et analyse ultime par votre Iro Sef préféré ! Venom, le Man-Spider, Jean Grey, la transformation de Spider-Man, l'identité et les nouveaux pouvoirs de Peter Parker, le symbiote, Sadie Sink, Punisher, HULK, La Main, TOUT est lié, on EXPLORE TOUT ! La théorie qui répond à la fin de Spider-Man No Way Home et sa scène post crédit. Bon visionnage 💀🔥👿 (Abonnez-vous ! Rejoignez l'aventure) 😇 Objectif 350.000 explorateurs !

📥 Mail pro : irosef@cultureg.eu

🪐 Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/iro_sef/

📩 Mail perso : sefiroxshow@gmail.com

snippet.title: Elbaph Arc Official Trailer | April 5, 2026 | ONE PIECE
snippet.description:
Anime ONE PIECE broadcast will resume in Japan with the crew setting sail to Elbaph!
April 5, 2026 11:15 PM(JST)

♪OPENING THEME "Luminous"by AiNA THE END

◆ Synopsis
After a daring escape from the Future Island Egghead, the Straw Hat Crew set their course for a legendary destination. Joined by the mighty Giant Warrior Pirates, they finally reach Elbaph, the long-awaited Land of Giants. 

New encounters with Giants, and long hoped for reunions unfold. A colossal new chapter begins as the crew heads into an adventure unlike anything before, all in the pursuit of the ultimate treasure, the “ONE PIECE!”

In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

snippet.title: LE CLONAGE POUR LES NULS !! -Dr. Clone- [RICK ET MORTY ?]
snippet.description:
C'est pas de la magie. Enfin, plus depuis que je la comprends.

Dr. Clone ! Vous êtes un clone. Sûrement un clone de clone d'ailleurs. Et même, une démo de clone de clone. Vous êtes là pour produire des trucs, telle est votre fonction. Ah, et vous habitez apparemment à Grove Street, dans San Andreas. Est-ce que tout ça serait une simulation ? Une réalité clonée ? Un clone de programme informatique ? D'un ordinateur imaginé dans l'esprit d'un clone, lui même faisant partie d'une simulation d'univers alternatif, qui aurait voyagé dans le temps ? Dans Minecraft ? Tellement de questions, et seulement 28 minutes pour y répondre. Il va falloir réfléchir vite.

Toujours merci à SpongePierre, miniaturiste assermenté et héros de vos coeurs.

Vous pouvez aussi m'suivre sur Twitter/X :
http://x.com/RoiLennon

Bisous et à la prochaine !
